headline: Morgan Stanley Says Eaton’s (ETN) Transformation Remains Underappreciated
summary: Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) is included among the 10 Best Blue Chip Stocks to Buy for Your Retirement Portfolio. On May 10, Morgan Stanley raised its price target on Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) to $500 from $425 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said Eaton’s transformation is still underappreciated at current […]

headline: 5 Stocks Winning the AI Race While Everyone Watches NVIDIA
summary: The real AI growth story has shifted to physical infrastructure. Keith Kaplan of TradeSmith identifies 5 stocks across memory, photonics, cooling, power, and the grid that still have significant upside.
